mapper.sql: ai_request_log_id, target_type, target_id, request_type, status, retry_no, request_payload, response_payload, error_code, error_message, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM ai_request_logs ORDER BY ai_request_log_id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_request_logs ( target_type, target_id, request_type, status, retry_no, request_payload, response_payload, error_code, error_message ) VALUES ( #{targetType}, #{targetId}, #{requestType}, #{status}, #{retryNo}, CAST(#{requestPayload} AS JSON), CAST(#{responsePayload} AS JSON), #{errorCode}, #{errorMessage} )
mapper.update: UPDATE ai_request_logs SET target_type = #{targetType}, target_id = #{targetId}, request_type = #{requestType}, status = #{status}, retry_no = #{retryNo}, request_payload = CAST(#{requestPayload} AS JSON), response_payload = CAST(#{responsePayload} AS JSON), error_code = #{errorCode}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE ai_request_log_id = #{aiRequestLogId}
